description: Run an early core commercial/Ash architecture gate after live Exa search, budget-aware durable execution, controlled candidate admission, shared retrieval/contracts, telemetry, migration, and UI query cleanup. Verify persisted behavior lives in Ash resources/actions, callers use domain code interfaces, preview and admission boundaries remain distinct, meaningful queries are absent from LiveViews, AshOban owns durable work, composed writes are transactional/idempotent, and no Jido agent runtime or autonomous promotion exists. Provider-specific OpenGov, BidNet, SAM, and browser-session readiness do not block this core gate; they gate procurement E2E directly. Acceptance: violations are fixed or split into blocking beads, compile/format/focused tests and generated resource map checks pass, and fx2.26 plus fx2.28 can start independently of procurement adapters and feedback/health-learning work.
title: Run mid-epic Ash architecture quality gate
